summary: Sales-data enrichment platform scaling rapidly through AI-native workflows.

insights.insight: Clay is hiring 6 forward-deployed engineers in NYC — they're investing heavily in white-glove onboarding for enterprise accounts.
insights.evidence: LinkedIn Jobs · 6 active reqs posted in the last 21 days

insights.insight: Just shipped a Claude integration for their AI agents — they're betting on multi-model orchestration, not just OpenAI.
Top complaint in recent reviews: credit consumption is unpredictable on large enrichment runs. Pricing transparency is a sore spot.
insights.evidence: G2 · 4 reviews mentioning 'credits' in the last 30 days

insights.insight: Two open roles for 'AI Solutions Architect' explicitly mention building custom agents on top of Clay — they're positioning as a platform, not a tool.
insights.evidence: Clay careers page · roles updated this week

emailSeed.subject: Forward-deployed at Clay — a thought on enterprise rollout
emailSeed.angle: Reference the FDE hiring spree and the credit-transparency pain point.
